title: eYone Baby Blanket 80×110 cm - Soft Fleece - Classic Lightweight Baby Blanket - Pram, Cot & Stroller - Unisex Gift - Off White
features: SOFT & LIGHTWEIGHT FLEECE: Cloud-soft fleece is gentle on delicate newborn skin, cosy in every season and ideal for layering.
DESIGNED TO LAST: 80×110 cm size provides comfort from newborn to toddler; perfect for naps, tummy time and nursery use.
TIMELESS OFF-WHITE: Neutral ivory tone with ribbon wrap - a classic unisex baby gift.
EASY CARE: Machine washable at 30°C, quick-drying and keeps its softness after many washes.
SAFE & VERSATILE: Breathable fleece keeps babies snug without irritation — suitable for stroller walks, car seats or as a nursery throw.
description: Our fleece baby blanket, crafted from 100% polyester, is designed for long-lasting softness and durability. Its single-layer design ensures that it's lightweight yet warm, offering a breathable option that’s perfect for use in any season. With dimensions of 110 x 80 cm, it provides just the right amount of coverage for babies and toddlers without feeling too bulky or heavy. Whether you're using it for swaddling, in a stroller, or as a car seat cover, this blanket is incredibly versatile. For best results and to ensure maximum comfort, we suggest washing it before the first use.
